'''Turren Lonarr''' was the [[President/Legends|president]] of [[Temporary Droids]]. He worked on [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] delivering [[Droid/Legends|droids]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].<ref name="Kashyyyk in Flames" />

Lonarr had no love for [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]], and his time among [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshans]] further developed his anti-Wookiee feelings. He was asked by a high ranking Trandoshan official to help smuggle [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] hunters onto Kashyyyk. The purpose was to force the Wookiee [[Senator/Legends|senator]] [[Yarua/Legends|Yarua]] to return to Kashyyyk, allowing the Trandoshans to ramrod legislation through the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Senate]] in his absence, allowing "limited" logging on Kashyyyk.<ref name="Kashyyyk in Flames" />

[[File:Trandoshan_saboteur.jpg|thumb|left|100px|A [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] saboteur working for Lonarr]]
To hide his operation, Lonarr was forced to have Wookiee firefighter [[Rruurrfhurra]] killed, but was eventually caught and brought to justice.<ref name="Kashyyyk in Flames" />
